name: clmm_amount0_always_zero
description: get_amount0_for_liquidity's saturating_sub operand order is inverted (numerator/sqrt_upper - numerator/sqrt_lower instead of the reverse), so get_amounts_for_liquidity returns amount0=0 for essentially every non-degenerate range priced at or below its lower bound. Minimal reproducer: tick range [0, 10000], price at/below the lower tick, liquidity=1_000_000_000.
